final:
// // This module controls the output voltage to be 0V when enabled and 5V when disabled
module LDO_Regulator (
    input wire enable,
    output reg output_voltage
);
    always @(*) begin
        if (enable) begin
            output_voltage = 1'b1; // 5V represented as logic high
        end else begin
            output_voltage = 1'b0; // 0V represented as logic low
        end
    end
endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module controls the output voltage to be 0V when enabled and 5V when disabled
